Public Attributes

Material mat
 
string objName
 

Properties

DRect obUVRectIfTilingSame [get]
 If considerUVs = true is set to the UV rect of the source mesh otherwise if considerUVs = false is set to 0,0,1,1.
 
DRect samplingRectMatAndUVTiling [get]
 
DRect materialTiling [get]
 IMPORTANT: There are two materialTilingRects. These ones are stored per source material. For mapping materials to atlas rects and transforming UVs, NOT for baking atlases.
Is set to materialTiling if allTexturesUseSameMatTiling otherwise is set to 0,0,1,1.

Property Documentation

◆ materialTiling

DRect DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MatAndTransformToMerged.materialTiling
get

IMPORTANT: There are two materialTilingRects. These ones are stored per source material. For mapping materials to atlas rects and transforming UVs, NOT for baking atlases.
Is set to materialTiling if allTexturesUseSameMatTiling otherwise is set to 0,0,1,1.

◆ obUVRectIfTilingSame

DRect DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MatAndTransformToMerged.obUVRectIfTilingSame
get

If considerUVs = true is set to the UV rect of the source mesh otherwise if considerUVs = false is set to 0,0,1,1.
